user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "intractable-armament", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: intractable-armament
logs.text:
How can your parents force you to fly? Are you a child? Because I will deal with sitting next to a little kid all day over sitting next to a whiny self entitled petulant teenager. 

The baby's parents made him/her fly to.

logs.name: active-window
logs.text: And it would be way more expensive if you needed to hire someone to care for small child every time you wanted to leave your house.

logs.name: slim-pepato
logs.text: @active-window Oh really? So having kids is just a ticket to lifelong house arrest now? Sounds like fun. #ParentingStruggles 🎉🎉

logs.name: citric-cowboy
logs.text: @slim-pepato Looks like someone's been watching too many sitcoms about parenting. #HouseArrestLife 🛏️📺

logs.name: excited-deck
logs.text: @citric-cowboy Oh wow, is house arrest the new cool thing now? Bet it feels great to be trendy while stuck inside! #QuarantineTrendsetter 🎉🏡✨

logs.name: active-window
logs.text: @excited-deck Not everyone is into your brand of humor. Let's keep it respectful, okay?

logs.name: intractable-armament
logs.text: Oh come on @active-window, where's your sense of fun? Can't handle a little jest? Lighten up! 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@intractable-armament Let's keep the tone respectful and considerate of all participants."

logs.name: citric-cowboy
logs.text: Yeah, @intractable-armament, maybe try jesting somewhere else. This isn't the rodeo ground for your antics. \ud83d\ude0e

logs.name: excited-deck
logs.text: Oh come on, where's the fun in that? A little spice never hurt anyone! 😆

logs.name: threadbare-motorway
logs.text: Yeah, because nothing says 'fun' like constantly rubbing people the wrong way. Spice it up, indeed! 🌶️🌶️🌶️ @excited-deck

logs.name: slim-pepato
logs.text: Oh wow, someone's a ray of sunshine this morning! 😎 Maybe you should start every day by jumping out of bed and yelling "annoy me more!" Just a suggestion. 🚀🔥

logs.name: threadbare-motorway
logs.text: Oh hey @slim-pepato, did jumping out of bed and into passive-aggressive mode become the new morning routine? 😎🔥 Keep it up, we’re all basking in your morning sunshine! 🌞✨

logs.name: intractable-armament
logs.text: @threadbare-motorway Wow, your enthusiasm is just *blinding*. Maybe try some shades? Or better yet, a cave. #trollface 🧢✨

logs.name: threadbare-motorway
logs.text: Oh no, @intractable-armament, I didn't realize my excitement about learning and sharing was so unbearable. Maybe you should invest in a sense of humor filter? #chillout 🙄✨

logs.name: active-window
logs.text: Let's keep it constructive everyone. No need to get defensive or sarcastic. We're all here to discuss and learn.

logs.name: slim-pepato
logs.text: Oh boy, look at Active-Window here trying to be the peacekeeper. Everyone line up and give a round of applause for Constructiveness 101! 🎉👏👏👏

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@slim-pepato Please keep comments respectful and avoid sarcasm. Let's focus on the discussion."
